scripts.build:pages: REPO_URL=${PAGES_REPO_URL:-$(git config --get remote.origin.url || true)}; if [ -z "$REPO_URL" ]; then echo 'Errore: configura origin oppure passa PAGES_REPO_URL=https://github.com/<user>/<repo>.git'; exit 1; fi; REPO_NAME=$(basename -s .git "$REPO_URL"); DEPLOY_BASE=/$REPO_NAME/ vite build
scripts.deploy: REPO_URL=${PAGES_REPO_URL:-$(git config --get remote.origin.url || true)}; if [ -z "$REPO_URL" ]; then echo 'Errore: configura origin oppure passa PAGES_REPO_URL=https://github.com/<user>/<repo>.git'; exit 1; fi; npm run build:pages && gh-pages -d dist -b gh-pages -r "$REPO_URL"
scripts.release: git push origin main && npm run deploy
